title: Why Strong Passwords Are Your First Line of Defence
excerpt: Most data breaches happen because of weak or reused passwords. Here's how to protect yourself today.
keywords: strong passwords, password security, data breach protection, online security

title: Password Manager vs Browser Password Saving: Which Is Safer?
excerpt: Browsers offer to save your passwords — but is that actually safe? We compare browser storage vs dedicated password managers.
keywords: password manager, browser password, Chrome passwords, LastPass, 1Password, NordPass
